title: Ooga Booga Craft
description: This modpack is based on TerraFirmaCraft, enhancing its core experience, improving world interaction, and introducing new realistic survival mechanics.
body:
![Ooga Booga 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/050446a88145973b1bd64c0e9da8eb9316faf7e5.png)
![Created by Fennec Studio](https://img.shields.io/badge/Created%20by-Fennec%20Studio-black?style=for-the-badge) ![License Apache-2.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/Licensed-Apache--2.0-009688?style=for-the-badge) ![Version NeoForge 1.21.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-NeoForge%201.21.1-FF9800?style=for-the-badge)

**Ooga Booga Craft** – a survival-focused modpack built on TerraFirmaCraft, perfect for players who enjoy exploring, surviving, and thriving in a challenging world, solo or with friends.

_Key Features:_

[![TerraFirmaCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e8cc58b0c4f75a6f3a47f3711b5f8369f24efcb_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) [![Corpse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55f10150177e723c74b8f9682f326b7b56734745_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse) [![Simple voice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a77f7bbed8b8b5105977e6bb1f9fb1a06eeb59e_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) [![Emote craft ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5a0b02cf916bfd17da49749edc01e1279779698_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/emotecraft) [![Horses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45ad8a63003b6dc896e0dadacd2812b3b356ed04_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/astikorcarts-redux) [![Ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5edbc93ce0aec229dda5f793e516f691c4a380c4_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships)

Step into a world where survival isn’t just about gathering resources — it’s about strategy, cooperation, and personalizing your gameplay in a truly unique environment.
